ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "sno" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entry */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the financial_instruments table */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price record */,
  "price" REAL /* Closing price on the date */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price on the date */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price on the date */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price on the date */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of stocks traded on the date */,
  "change_percent" REAL /* Percentage change from the previous day's closing price */,
  "moving_average_50" REAL /* 50-day moving average */,
  "moving_average_200" REAL /* 200-day moving average */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Volatility measure (e.g., standard deviation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sno")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin, viewer) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action taken */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed (e.g., viewed data, exported report) */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument accessed (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_learning_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine learning model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine learning model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the machine learning model (e.g., linear regression, decision tree) */,
  "training_data" TEXT /* Training data used to train the model */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the machine_learning_models table */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the financial_instruments table */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date for which the prediction was made */,
  "predicted_price" REAL /* Predicted price */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES machine_learning_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_exports" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data export */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "export_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data export */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the financial_instruments table */,
  "export_format" TEXT /* Format of the exported data (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
